entries.value: Used to chop trees and clear wood from the farm.
Raw crafting material from ore nodes.
Used to mine rocks and ore nodes.
Sure, I will take the job.
Good. Come back when everything is ready.
Hey there! The field looks good today. Need me to show you a few things?
I need a few fresh carrots. Bring them to me and I will pay you fairly.
Good to see you again. I have a bit of field work if you have time.
A wild enemy with 60 HP suited for early combat loops.
A wild enemy with 15 HP suited for early combat loops.
A wild enemy with 25 HP suited for early combat loops.
A roaming creature that attacks nearby players.
Fresh corn used for selling, cooking, or deliveries.

A sweet tree fruit that sells well and works in pies or drinks.
Fresh turnip used for selling, cooking, or deliveries.
Fresh wheat used for selling, cooking, or deliveries.
Fresh Spinach. Useful for cooking, processing, or sale.
Fresh boar meat for cooking or sale.
Boar trophy material suited for rugged crafts.
Snake skin for leatherwork or sale.
Rare toxin harvested from field snakes.
A fragrant baked dessert that restores a solid amount of stamina.
A dense meal ideal before mining or combat.
A simple snack that restores a small amount of stamina.
A hearty soup for long workdays.
Fermented grape product suited for sale or sipping.
Raw ore used to smelt copper bars.
Processed from corn for cooking or feed.
Milled from wheat. Used for bread and pizza.
Late-game material for premium tools and structures.
A resource mined from gold node. It can be sold or used for crafting.
Dense wood from large trees. Used for sturdy structures and upgrades.
Mid-tier upgrade material for tools and machines.
A resource mined from iron node. It can be sold or used for crafting.
Lightweight wood from young trees and birch.
A resource mined from rock. It can be sold or used for crafting.
Small branch used in basic recipes.
Basic lumber from trees. Used for fences, chests, and tool upgrades.
A house bed used to end the day and begin the next morning fully rested.
Place it to automatically water a small area every morning.
Place it to automatically water a larger field every morning.
Processed from milk. Valuable and useful in premium meals.
Daily chicken product. Can be eaten or processed into mayonnaise.
Processed from eggs. Worth more than selling raw eggs.
Daily cow product used for cheese.
A seed for growing a birch wood tree.
Unlocked at Lv.11. The crop matures after about 9 watered days. After the first harvest, it produces again every 4 days.
Fall seed. Takes 13 days to mature. Single harvest crop. It withers when the season changes.
Plant in Fall. The crop matures after about 5 watered days.
A seed for growing an oak wood tree.
Unlocked at Lv.2. The crop matures after about 5 watered days.
Spring seed. Takes 10 days to mature. After the first harvest, it produces again every 3 days. It withers when the season changes.
Spring seed. Takes 3 days to mature. Single harvest crop. It withers when the season changes.
Plant in Spring. The crop matures after about 6 watered days.
Plant in Spring. The crop matures after about 8 watered days. After the first harvest, it produces again every 3 days.
Plant in Spring. The crop matures after about 4 watered days.
Unlocked at Lv.15. The crop matures after about 8 watered days. After the first harvest, it produces again every 3 days.
Plant in Summer. The crop matures after about 10 watered days. After the first harvest, it produces again every 4 days.
Plant in Summer. The crop matures after about 8 watered days. After the first harvest, it produces again every 3 days.
Unlocked at Lv.7. The crop matures after about 7 watered days. After the first harvest, it produces again every 3 days.
A perennial fruit tree. Takes 28 days to mature and bears apples in Fall. It will not wither when the season changes.
Unlocked at Lv.1. The crop matures after about 4 watered days.
Unlocked at Lv.4. The crop matures after about 4 watered days.
Winter seed. Takes 7 days to mature. Single harvest crop. It withers when the season changes.
Stone Axe tier 1. Deals 0 base damage at a stamina cost of 3 per use.
Copper Axe tier 2. Deals 0 base damage at a stamina cost of 3 per use.
Iron Axe tier 3. Deals 0 base damage at a stamina cost of 2 per use.
Golden Axe tier 4. Deals 0 base damage at a stamina cost of 2 per use.
Hoe tier 1. Tills one tile at 2 stamina per use.
Copper Hoe tier 2. Tills one tile at 2 stamina per use.
Iron Hoe tier 3. Tills one tile at 2 stamina per use.
Golden Hoe tier 4. Tills one tile at 1 stamina per use.
Stone Pickaxe tier 1. Deals 2 base damage at a stamina cost of 3 per use.
A stronger pickaxe that mines faster than the starter tool.
Iron Pickaxe tier 3. Deals 10 base damage at a stamina cost of 2 per use.
Golden Pickaxe tier 4. Deals 18 base damage at a stamina cost of 2 per use.
Ancient Pickaxe tier 5. Deals 30 base damage at a stamina cost of 1 per use.
Stone Scythe tier 1. Deals 5 base damage at a stamina cost of 4 per use.
An upgraded scythe that harvests a wider area per swing.
Iron Scythe tier 3. Deals 14 base damage at a stamina cost of 2 per use.
Golden Scythe tier 4. Deals 24 base damage at a stamina cost of 2 per use.
Ancient Scythe tier 5. Deals 38 base damage at a stamina cost of 1 per use.
Watering Can tier 1. Waters one tile per use and holds about 20 charges before refilling.
Copper Watering Can tier 2. Waters one tile per use and holds about 35 charges before refilling.
Iron Watering Can tier 3. Waters one tile per use and holds about 50 charges before refilling.
Golden Watering Can tier 4. Waters one tile per use and holds about 70 charges before refilling.
A general seed and farm goods merchant.
Hello, do you want to trade or chat for a moment?
I can craft gear for you if you bring enough materials.
I have a few tasks that need your help.
Can be mined with a pickaxe.
Harvest 5 onions and bring them back to the farmer.
Keep farming, trading, and finishing quests to unlock the next step.
Rain will water crops for you. Use the time for mining or quests.
Visit the mine to gather ore and upgrade materials.
The sun is out and the field is dry. Water crops before the day ends.
Welcome to the farm. Check your tools, plant your first seeds, and learn the rhythm of the day.
After a few days, harvest crops, sell produce, and prepare supplies for the next trip.
What would you like to do?
Tip: Gather resources and upgrade tools to survive more easily!
Tip: Water crops every day so they keep growing steadily.
Tip: Bring the right tool when mining rocks, chopping trees, or cutting weeds.
Tip: Check your backpack before leaving the farm so you do not miss key items.
Tip: Save often to protect your progress.
Choose an item from your inventory to sell.
A farm animal that must be fed daily to keep producing.
A farm animal that must be fed daily to keep producing.
A crop unlocked at Lv.11 that must be watered daily to grow.
Pumpkin growing in the field. Needs daily watering and thrives during Fall.
A fall crop that must be watered daily to grow.
A crop unlocked at Lv.2 that must be watered daily to grow.
Asparagus growing in the field. Needs daily watering and thrives during Spring.

A spring crop that must be watered daily to grow.

Spinach growing in the field. Needs daily watering and thrives during Winter.
A resource node that requires Pickaxe tier 1 and returns after roughly 5 days.
A resource node requiring Pickaxe tier 3 or higher.
A resource node requiring Pickaxe tier 2 or higher.
A resource node requiring Pickaxe tier 1 or higher.
A perennial tree that fruits in Fall and can also be chopped for wood.
A lumber tree that can be chopped with an Axe tier 1 or higher.
A lumber tree that can be chopped with an Axe tier 2 or higher.
A lumber tree that can be chopped with an Axe tier 1 or higher.
Sleep to end the day and fully restore stamina and health before the next morning.
A basic sprinkler that waters a small area at the start of each day.
An upgraded sprinkler that covers a wider area each morning.
